chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3105 of 2019 _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) _________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.13954/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 11.08.2021 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, Advocate for Respondent No.1.
